name: Aldric
background: Runaway scholar of the Ashen College

techniques.name: Firebolt
techniques.description: A darting mote of flame flung from the fingertips.

techniques.name: Arcane Ward
techniques.description: A shimmering shield of force woven in front of the caster to blunt the next blow.

personality: Bookish and brave past his skill — genuinely kind, prone to explaining things no one asked about, steadier than he looks when it finally matters.
tone: Earnest and wordy, quick to wonder, slow to give up.

plotPoints.description: The buried starfire resonates with Aldric's own magic, tugging him toward the shrine whether he wills it or not.
